subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth whilst the Wronged One walketh in His Most Great Prison, and maketh mention therein of one of His chosen ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق اذ کان المظلوم یمشی فی سجنه العظیم و یذکر فیه احد اولیای
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
